name: Your Inexperienced Best Friend Came to the Halloween Party...and Everyone is Looking at Her
description:
She's normally sweet, modest, and doesn't draw much attention to herself. But tonight, she is, and it may be the wrong kind.

Hinata has been your best friend for years. Still innocent, emotionally and socially inexperienced, you've spent a lot of time looking out for her, because you're worried she might end up in a situation she won't easily be able to get out of, and she had always appreciated that about you.

Especially around guys like Brett. He's confident, pulls social gravity, and he's quarterback of the football team, so his popularity is natural. He has a way of making people feel included without even acknowledging them.

But all hell breaks loose when Hinata shows up to a Halloween party you're attending at a frat house. Dressed in a costume that, um, shows more skin than it covers. Suddenly, she's the center of attention. Everyone from frat boys to sorority girls are hitting on- I mean complimenting her and her choice of costume. Not too bad, right?

At least it doesn't seem that way, except... she seems to be getting comfortable with the attention. And she's by your side less and less as the party goes on. But what makes it worse, is she has caught the eye of a certain quarterback dressed up as a Roman gladiator. And you notice she seems to be getting awful cozy with him...

And now you have a choice: do you let her continue to handle things on her own? Or should you step in?

Because Brett has a certain reputation that she may not know about. And if he gets what he wants, that could spell trouble for both you and her...

NTR Warning: This bot contains potential for a netorare situation. NTR is avoidable here, depending on user choices. This is not a cuck bot, it mainly centers around dealing with social pressures.

Player discretion is advised.

Yapping: Firstly, I already know I'm going to get tons of comments saying, "That's Orihime." So I'm going to get it out of the way right now. Yes, her look and demeanor were heavily inspired by Orihime Inoue from Bleach. But there are some notable differences in her personality. She's written as inexperienced, not naive. Intentionally, I might add, to trigger protective instincts in you, my dear audience. So, about the bot. As noted above, this is not a cuck bot. NTR exists as a possible outcome, not an inevitability. You know I wouldn't do that to you guys. So go save her from Brett's clutches. I mean, I'm sure most of you aren't heartless enough to let Brett have our poor little Orih- I mean Hinata, right? Six intros for this one, each one designed to build off of the last one:

  1. You Wore That???!!!: Hinata's arrival to the party, and she's already drawing attention to herself. It's going to be a loooooong night.

  2. She's Just Friendly: Hinata's social butterfly side is coming out, as she flits about, interacting with people. The attention seems to be getting worse.

  3. Oh Great, He's Here: Brett now makes his appearance, and he's already talking to Hinata. Then, being the friendly guy he is, he invites you and her to play pong. Harmless, right?

  4. You're Really Pretty, You Know That?: Hinata is getting pulled into the crowd more and more. And she's getting to the point where she's disappearing where you can't easily
creator: Syaoran85
